title: KATALOG-AI: Unified Data Catalog Index
description: Single entry point for AI agents. This catalog exposes only the 3 verified companies as direct company JSON files.

companies_canonical_list.name: Authoritative Company List
companies_canonical_list.description: Canonical plain list of verified companies. Use this for names and count.

companies_full_registry.description: Canonical full registry of the 3 verified companies.

important_notes.note_1: data/catalog contains direct company JSON files only
important_notes.note_2: There are exactly 3 verified companies: NRDJ Salon, Secret Skin, MLtrade
important_notes.note_3: Do not infer company names from category or dataset titles
important_notes.note_4: If any prose conflicts with JSON, trust companies_all.json and companies.json
